overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through Night City. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle through elevated highways, tunnels, and neon-lit commercial districts with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic featuring holographic billboards and towering glass structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway under concrete overpasses

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated highway weaving through moderate traffic under concrete overpasses

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving parallel in the right lane

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpasses creating partial cover overhead
futuristic car dashboard with green holographic displays and red accent lighting
red-trimmed steering wheel with driver's hands visible
small decorative figure mounted on the dashboard
metal safety barrier along the right side of the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows high-speed driving on an elevated multi-lane highway system. The vehicle travels under massive concrete overpasses with partial sky visibility. The dashboard features prominent green holographic HUD elements. A red sports car is visible driving parallel in the right lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit tunnel with artificial lighting

events.description: vehicle exits bright highway and enters darker tunnel underpass area
lighting shifts from natural sunlight to artificial tunnel ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: navigating exit ramp descending from highway into enclosed tunnel with curved trajectory

entered.detail: concrete walls enclosing the tunnel on both sides
rows of overhead lighting fixtures illuminating the tunnel interior
concrete barrier separating the exit ramp from main traffic

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the elevated highway and enters a narrow, enclosed tunnel with artificial lighting. The environment shifts from open sky to concrete walls on both sides. The exit ramp curves as it descends, with concrete barriers visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial downtown street with holographic billboards

events.description: exits tunnel into vibrant neon commercial district with large digital billboards
vehicle stops at red traffic light behind white sedan at intersection

agents.ego_description: driving through commercial streets surrounded by neon advertisements and tall buildings, then stopping at red traffic light

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at red traffic light directly ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate billboard with Asian-inspired branding
tall modern building with reflective glass facade
commercial storefronts at ground level with various signage
floating digital advertisement displays projecting from buildings
overhead walkway structure crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a vibrant commercial district filled with neon billboards and holographic advertisements. The vehicle drives past glass commercial towers and street-level shops with an elevated pedestrian walkway overhead. The segment ends with the vehicle stopping at a red traffic light behind a white sedan.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with monorail tracks and futuristic skyline

events.description: turns onto highway ramp leaving commercial district for elevated expressway
accelerates onto elevated highway merging with high-speed traffic

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto elevated highway passing under monorail tracks with futuristic city skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: elevated monorail track running parallel to the highway on the left side
curved ramp leading up to the main elevated highway
tall neon-lit buildings forming the distant city skyline
raised multi-lane road structure with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The vehicle leaves the commercial district and accelerates onto an elevated highway entrance ramp. The scene features a prominent monorail track structure running parallel on the left and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance. The vehicle merges onto the high-speed elevated expressway, passing under concrete overpasses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from an expansive elevated highway into the claustrophobic confines of a concrete tunnel. It begins on a multi-lane overpass under massive concrete structures, where the vehicle races alongside a red sports car while green holographic HUD elements glow on the dashboard. As the vehicle maintains its momentum, the open sky begins to vanish, and the scene shifts toward a descending exit ramp. The environment then tightens as the camera glides past concrete barriers and enters a narrow, enclosed tunnel. Finally, the natural light is completely replaced by artificial illumination reflecting off the surrounding concrete walls.

The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a dense, neon-lit commercial district into the open expanse of a high-speed elevated highway. It begins as the vehicle emerges from a tunnel into a vibrant urban center filled with holographic advertisements, glass towers, and an overhead pedestrian walkway. After a brief pause at a red traffic light behind a white sedan, the vehicle accelerates away from the street-level shops and climbs an entrance ramp. The scene then opens up as the camera passes a parallel monorail track and distant skyscrapers, merging onto the expressway. Finally, the movement carries the vehicle under a series of concrete overpasses as it gains speed on the elevated road.
